word: G5580 - ψευδόχριστος - pseudóchristos - psyoo-dokh'-ris-tos - False Christ

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ψευδόχριστος

- Transliteration: Pseudochristos

- Phonetic: psyoo-dokh'-ris-tos

- Definition:

1. a false Christ (or Messiah)

2. one who falsely lays claim to the name and office of the Messiah

- Origin: from G5571 and G5547

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G5571 and G5547; a spurious messiah: - false christ.
